name: ClinicalTrials.gov: Interventional Studies (Clinical Trials)

name: OpenFDA: Drug Adverse Events
description: Adverse event reports for drugs and therapeutic biologics. ~20,000,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Drug Labeling
description: Structured product labeling (SPL) for prescription/OTC drugs. ~130,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Drug NDC Directory
description: National Drug Code directory — all marketed drug packages. ~250,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Drug Recalls
description: Drug recall enforcement reports. ~20,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Drugs@FDA
description: FDA-approved drug products with approval history. ~50,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Device Adverse Events
description: Medical device adverse event reports (MAUDE). ~15,000,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Device Classification
description: Medical device product classification database. ~7,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Device 510(k)
description: 510(k) premarket notification clearances. ~220,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Device Recalls
description: Medical device recall enforcement reports. ~100,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Device PMA
description: Premarket approval (PMA) decisions. ~35,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Food Recalls
description: Food and cosmetic recall enforcement reports. ~25,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Food Adverse Events
description: CAERS food/cosmetic adverse event reports. ~300,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Tobacco Problem Reports
description: Tobacco product problem reports. ~50,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: Animal Drug Adverse Events
description: Adverse event reports for animal drugs. ~1,000,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: OpenFDA: NDC SPL Substances
description: Unique ingredient substances in SPL data. ~70,000 records. Free API, no key required (rate-limited).

name: GBIF: OCCURRENCE Datasets
description: 52,754 occurrence datasets from GBIF. Contains species occurrence records from natural history collections, citizen science, and research worldwide.

name: GBIF: CHECKLIST Datasets
description: 63,652 checklist datasets from GBIF. Contains species occurrence records from natural history collections, citizen science, and research worldwide.

name: GBIF: SAMPLING EVENT Datasets
description: 4,653 sampling event datasets from GBIF. Contains species occurrence records from natural history collections, citizen science, and research worldwide.

name: GBIF: METADATA Datasets
description: 529 metadata datasets from GBIF. Contains species occurrence records from natural history collections, citizen science, and research worldwide.

name: GBIF: All Species Occurrence Records
description: 3,777,796,026 species occurrence records from museums, herbaria, citizen science (eBird, iNaturalist), and research collections worldwide.

name: OpenAlex: Scholarly Works
description: Journal articles, preprints, books, datasets, dissertations. 307,917,567 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Authors
description: Researchers and authors with publication profiles. 118,471,449 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Sources
description: Journals, repositories, conferences, preprint servers. 281,567 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Institutions
description: Universities, research institutes, hospitals, companies. 123,620 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Concepts/Topics
description: Hierarchical topic classification of scholarly works. 65,026 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Publishers
description: Academic publishers (Elsevier, Springer, etc.). 10,703 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.

name: OpenAlex: Funders
description: Research funding organizations (NIH, NSF, etc.). 45,640 records. Free API, no key required. Polite pool with email in User-Agent.
